note: V11 banner HOTFIX — lottery exclusion rule corrected to match the C7.1 design simplification already shipped on the v11-phase2 branch. The previous v84 wording on main still showed two bullets ('miner who won the current block cannot enter that block's lottery' + '5-block cooldown'); the current rule is a SINGLE rule — an address is excluded iff it won a block reward in the previous 5 blocks. The current block itself does NOT count for cooldown. A miner who finds the current block may enter that block's lottery, provided that same address did not also win any of the previous 5 blocks. v85 was reserved for the v11-phase2 branch update; main jumped v84 -> v86 to keep the version stream linear. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
